brand.name: CIVIX
brand.vibe: Sleek Modern, Vibrant, Trustworthy, Hyperlocal Startup

components.cards: Flat background (surface), 1px subtle border, soft shadow on hover (-translate-y-1).
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary buttons use primary color. Heavy font-weight.
components.search_bar: Massive, floating, prominent shadow. Contains voice search icon pulsing. Must be clearly visible over hero image.
components.floating_action_button: Emergency mode. Fixed bottom right. Pulsing red shadow.

landing.hero: Hero section using hero_city_map background. Vibrant 3D abstract look. Include a floating glass card containing the Smart Search Bar.
landing.search: Animated placeholder text (Hinglish examples: 'AC repair in Kadma', 'Plumber near me')
landing.categories: Bento grid of services (Plumbing, Electrical, Cleaning, Beauty).
landing.featured: Horizontal scroll or grid of featured trusted workers.

service_listing.layout: Grid of dense service cards. Floating Map/List toggle at bottom center.
service_listing.filters: Horizontal scrolling pill chips for Price, Rating, Distance.

service_detail.trust_badge: Prominent display of AI Trust Score icon.
service_detail.snap_to_fix: Interactive section to upload photo using the snap_to_fix_illustration.
service_detail.cta: Sticky bottom bar for 'Book Now' on mobile.

dashboard.layout: Bento grid for analytics, recent bookings, personalized recommendations.

images.description: Abstract 3D vibrant isometric map of Jamshedpur.
3D modern glowing smartphone scanning a broken pipe.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do not use default blue.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide React.
Build mobile-first. Ensure all bottom action bars (Map toggle, Book now) are sticky on mobile.
Implement 'data-testid' on all buttons and interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='voice-search-btn').
Hero section should overlay the floating search bar atop the 3D map background.
Create a Marquee using Framer Motion or react-fast-marquee for 'Trending Searches'.
Use standard Tailwind CSS and HTML elements for custom layouts. Use Shadcn UI for dropdowns, dialogs, and complex interactive components.
Inject the Hinglish context (e.g., 'Bijli theek karani hai', 'Nal leak ho raha hai') into the animated search bar placeholder.
Create the Emergency Mode FAB with a pulsing red ring animation.
Do NOT use placeholder text or placeholder URLs for images. Use the exact URLs provided in this file.
